## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor/chore

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue (if applicable)
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Updated docs/README for user-facing changes
